problem id: 567e3da4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  00110001 -> 00010011
  00001001 -> 00010000
  01010110 -> 01100101
  01010001 -> 00010101
  01110100 -> 01000111
  10100110 -> 01101010
  10111000 -> 10001011
  01100100 -> 01000110
  01011011 -> 00110101

query: 01001000
predicted answer: 10000100
